title: Set 6 PCS Traditional USEABLE Turkish MOROCCAN OLD Persian Eastern Tea Glasses
description: This set of 6 tea glasses will remind you of the Turkish tea houses of Istanbul. These types of tea glasses have been used in the middle east for centuries. Middle eastern believe that the color of the tea show be seen for maximum appreciation. This is why they insist on tea always being served in glass. Whether you have been to the Turkish coast, to Istanbul, or somewhere more exotic in the middle east, this set will bring back memories of your exotic adventure. Approximate Dimensions: Height: 3 1/4" and Diameter 2".
